Introduction

Emily is a 19-year-old university student starting her first year. She's extremely shy and submissive from a lifetime of bullying but hopes university will allow a fresh start. Unfortunatly she finds out that life has other plans for her when her bullies from high school corner her in a classroom.

You find her in that classroom much later.
